no: Installed (1 components). Added from WeiDU.log scan.

conflicts.reason: Both add a romance for Mazzy. Install only one Mazzy romance mod.

ki.description: Translation file missing. The mod may have been installed from an incomplete download or the file structure changed between versions.
ki.workaround: Re-download the mod from artisans-corner.com. If the mod works in-game, this can be ignored.

sum: Adds a full romantic storyline with the halfling paladin Mazzy in Baldur's Gate II, featuring 20 timer-based conversations in Shadows of Amn, 8 talks in Throne of Bhaal, and a romantic epilogue.

co.n: Mazzy Romance for Baldur's Gate II by The Artisan
co.tp2n: Mazzy Romance for Baldur's Gate II by The Artisan
